requirement_topic.en: Market Access and Import — BIS Registration, Type Approval, and Customs Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入与进口——BIS注册、型式批准及海关要求
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入與進口——BIS登記、型式批准及海關要求

summary.en: Import of EV charging equipment into India requires compliance with multiple regulatory layers. The Ministry of Heavy Industries PM E-DRIVE scheme, notified in September 2024, replaced the earlier FAME-II incentive framework and now governs central support for EV adoption and charging infrastructure. For product compliance, the MHI Electrical Equipment (Quality Control) Order, 2024 brings EV conductive charging equipment under mandatory BIS conformity assessment and enforces IS 17017. Complete EVSE units covered by IS 17017 Part 1 must be registered under BIS CRS Scheme-II before import, sale, or distribution; the BIS registration certificate is therefore an import prerequisite. EV chargers are also subject to applicable Customs duties and GST on import. ARAI type approval under AIS-138 may be required for connectors as a separate approval from BIS product registration.
summary.zh: 电动汽车充电设备进口印度须满足多层监管要求。印度重工业部于2024年9月通知实施的PM E-DRIVE计划已取代此前的FAME-II激励框架，现作为中央层面对电动汽车采用及充电基础设施支持的主要政策。就产品合规而言，重工业部《电气设备（质量控制）令，2024》将电动汽车传导式充电设备纳入强制性BIS合格评定，并强制执行IS 17017。受IS 17017第1部分覆盖的完整EVSE整机须在进口、销售或分发前依据BIS CRS Scheme-II完成注册；因此，BIS注册证书是进口前置要求。电动汽车充电桩进口还可能须缴纳适用的关税及商品服务税（GST）。依据AIS-138的ARAI连接器型式批准可能须作为独立于BIS产品注册的单独批准获取。
summary.zht: 電動汽車充電設備進口印度須滿足多層監管要求。印度重工業部於2024年9月通知實施的PM E-DRIVE計劃已取代此前的FAME-II激勵框架，現作為中央層面對電動汽車採用及充電基礎設施支持的主要政策。就產品合規而言，重工業部《電氣設備（質量控制）令，2024》將電動汽車傳導式充電設備納入強制性BIS合格評定，並強制執行IS 17017。受IS 17017第1部分覆蓋的完整EVSE整機須在進口、銷售或分發前依據BIS CRS Scheme-II完成登記；因此，BIS登記證書是進口前置要求。電動汽車充電樁進口還可能須繳納適用的關稅及商品服務稅（GST）。依據AIS-138的ARAI連接器型式批准可能須作為獨立於BIS產品登記的單獨批准獲取。

standards_or_laws: PM Electric Drive Revolution in Innovative Vehicle Enhancement (PM E-DRIVE) Scheme, Ministry of Heavy Industries, notified September 2024 — replaces FAME-II

Electrical Equipment (Quality Control) Order, 2024 — Ministry of Heavy Industries; mandatory BIS conformity assessment for electrical equipment including EV conductive charging equipment under IS 17017
IS 17017 Part 1:2018 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements
BIS Act 2016 and BIS (Conformity Assessment) Regulations 2018 — CRS Scheme-II registration framework
Guidelines for Installation and Operation of Electric Vehicle Charging Infrastructure 2024, Ministry of Power, 17 September 2024
Foreign Trade Policy of India (current edition — Ministry of Commerce and Industry)
Customs Tariff Act 1975 and applicable import duty notifications (CBIC)
Central Goods and Services Tax Act 2017 and integrated GST on imports

summary.en: China's equivalent market-access pathway for domestic EV charger sales is CCC (China Compulsory Certification) under CNCA-C25-01:2024, mandatory from 1 March 2025 and administered by CNCA/SAMR. For export, China does not impose export licensing requirements specific to EV chargers (general export customs clearance applies). Chinese CCC registration covers both safety and EMC in a single certificate. Chinese CCC certificates and CNCA registration are not recognised in India; a separate BIS CRS registration is mandatory for the Indian market.
summary.zh: 中国国内电动汽车充电桩销售的市场准入路径为依据CNCA-C25-01:2024的强制性3C认证，自2025年3月1日起强制实施，由CNCA/SAMR管理。就出口而言，中国对电动汽车充电桩不设特定出口许可要求（适用一般出口海关手续）。中国3C注册通过单一证书同时涵盖安全及EMC。中国3C证书及CNCA注册在印度不被认可；印度市场强制要求另行取得BIS CRS注册。
summary.zht: 中國國內電動汽車充電樁銷售的市場准入路徑為依據CNCA-C25-01:2024的強制性3C認證，自2025年3月1日起強制實施，由CNCA/SAMR管理。就出口而言，中國對電動汽車充電樁不設特定出口許可要求（適用一般出口海關手續）。中國3C注冊通過單一證書同時涵蓋安全及EMC。中國3C證書及CNCA注冊在印度不被認可；印度市場強制要求另行取得BIS CRS登記。

standards_or_laws: CNCA-C25-01:2024 — CCC mandatory certification catalogue for EV charging equipment (effective 1 March 2025)
China Compulsory Certification (3C) system administered by CNCA/SAMR

gap.en: The market-access gap is structural and multi-layered: (1) BIS CRS Scheme-II registration is mandatory for complete EVSE units covered by IS 17017 Part 1 under the MHI Electrical Equipment (Quality Control) Order, 2024, and the BIS registration certificate must be in place before import; (2) no CCC or CE certificate substitutes for BIS registration; (3) the authorised Indian representative / importer must be established in India to hold the BIS registration certificate; (4) ARAI type approval for AIS-138 connectors may be a separate mandatory step; (5) the bill of entry and product labelling must align with the BIS registration and applicable Standard Mark requirements; (6) import duty and GST rates for EV chargers should be verified with CBIC at time of import as these are subject to change. China-to-India EV charger exports therefore require BIS CRS Scheme-II registration to IS 17017, AIS-138 connector redesign, Indian authorised representative arrangement, and customs documentation aligned with current CBIC tariff notifications.
gap.zh: 市场准入差距具有结构性和多层次性：（1）依据重工业部《电气设备（质量控制）令，2024》，受IS 17017第1部分覆盖的完整EVSE整机须强制取得BIS CRS Scheme-II注册，且BIS注册证书须在进口前取得；（2）3C或CE证书均不可替代BIS注册；（3）授权印度代表/进口商须在印度设立，以持有BIS注册证书；（4）AIS-138连接器的ARAI型式批准可能是额外强制步骤；（5）进口报关单及产品标签须与BIS注册和适用的标准标志要求一致；（6）电动汽车充电桩的进口关税及GST税率须在进口时向CBIC核实，因其可能变动。因此，中国向印度出口充电桩须完成：依据IS 17017的BIS CRS Scheme-II注册、AIS-138连接器重新设计、印度授权代表安排，以及与现行CBIC关税通知相符的海关文件准备。
gap.zht: 市場准入差距具有結構性和多層次性：（1）依據重工業部《電氣設備（質量控制）令，2024》，受IS 17017第1部分覆蓋的完整EVSE整機須強制取得BIS CRS Scheme-II登記，且BIS登記證書須在進口前取得；（2）3C或CE證書均不可替代BIS登記；（3）授權印度代表/進口商須在印度設立，以持有BIS登記證書；（4）AIS-138連接器的ARAI型式批准可能是額外強制步驟；（5）進口報關單及產品標籤須與BIS登記和適用的標準標誌要求一致；（6）電動汽車充電樁的進口關稅及GST稅率須在進口時向CBIC核實，因其可能變動。因此，中國向印度出口充電樁須完成：依據IS 17017的BIS CRS Scheme-II登記、AIS-138連接器重新設計、印度授權代表安排，以及與現行CBIC關稅通知相符的海關文件準備。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — complete EVSE units covered by IS 17017 Part 1 require BIS CRS Scheme-II registration under the MHI Electrical Equipment (Quality Control) Order, 2024 before import, sale, or distribution; AIS-138 connector approval may be a separate mandatory requirement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic market — CCC mandatory from 1 March 2025; no specific export licensing for EV chargers under current China foreign trade rules

source.publisher: Ministry of Heavy Industries, Government of India

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] China-to-India EV charger exports face mandatory BIS CRS Scheme-II registration for complete EVSE units under IS 17017 Part 1, as enforced by the MHI Electrical Equipment (Quality Control) Order, 2024. The PM E-DRIVE scheme notified in September 2024 replaced FAME-II for central EV support, while the Ministry of Power Guidelines for Installation and Operation of EV Charging Infrastructure 2024 govern charging-infrastructure deployment. No Chinese certification (CCC, CQC, or GB/T test report) substitutes for BIS registration. ARAI type approval for AIS-138 connectors may be required as a separate step. Exporters should verify current import duty and GST rates with CBIC before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据重工业部《电气设备（质量控制）令，2024》，中国向印度出口电动汽车充电桩时，受IS 17017第1部分覆盖的完整EVSE整机须强制取得BIS CRS Scheme-II注册。2024年9月通知实施的PM E-DRIVE计划已取代FAME-II，作为中央电动汽车支持政策；电力部《电动汽车充电基础设施安装与运营指南，2024》则规范充电基础设施部署。中国任何认证（3C、CQC或GB/T检测报告）均不可替代BIS注册。AIS-138连接器的ARAI型式批准可能须作为独立步骤完成。出口商应在发货前向CBIC核实现行进口关税及GST税率。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據重工業部《電氣設備（質量控制）令，2024》，中國向印度出口電動汽車充電樁時，受IS 17017第1部分覆蓋的完整EVSE整機須強制取得BIS CRS Scheme-II登記。2024年9月通知實施的PM E-DRIVE計劃已取代FAME-II，作為中央電動汽車支持政策；電力部《電動汽車充電基礎設施安裝與運營指南，2024》則規範充電基礎設施部署。中國任何認證（3C、CQC或GB/T檢測報告）均不可替代BIS登記。AIS-138連接器的ARAI型式批准可能須作為獨立步驟完成。出口商應在發貨前向CBIC核實現行進口關稅及GST稅率。
